ast.name: desc
ast.source: Utility function that provides help about ExcalidrawAutomate functions and properties. I recommend calling this function from Developer Console to print out help to the console.
ast.target: 提供有关 ExcalidrawAutomate 函数和属性的帮助信息的实用函数。我建议从开发者控制台调用此函数，以将帮助信息打印到控制台。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns true if the file is an Excalidraw Mask file. If file is not provided, the function will use ea.targetView.file
ast.target: 如果文件是 Excalidraw 蒙版文件，则返回 true。如果未提供文件，该函数将使用 ea.targetView.file

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A modified version of the Obsidian.Modal class that allows the modal to be dragged around the screen and that does not dim the background.
ast.target: Obsidian.Modal 类的一个修改版本，允许模态框在屏幕上拖动，并且不会使背景变暗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: the images files including DataURL, indexed by fileId
ast.target: 图片文件，包括 DataURL，按 fileId 索引。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Rotation of the object in radian

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 100: 完全不透明\n0: 完全透明

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
set to null for 'sharp', else the stroke will be 'round'
type: 1==LEGACY,
2==PROPORTIONAL RADIUS,
3==ADAPTIVE RADIUS, value: adaptive factor defaults to 32
ast.target:
设置为 null 表示 '尖锐'，否则描边将为 '圆角'
类型: 1==传统,
2==比例半径,
3==自适应半径, 值: 自适应因子默认为 32

ast.name: desc
ast.source: 1: Virgil, 2:Helvetica, 3:Cascadia, 4:Local Font, 5: Excalifont, 6: Nunito, 7: Lilita One, 8: Comic Shanns, 9: Liberation Sans
ast.target: 1: Virgil, 2:Helvetica, 3:Cascadia, 4:本地字体, 5: Excalifont, 6: Nunito, 7: Lilita One, 8: Comic Shanns, 9: Liberation Sans

ast.name: desc
ast.source: For future use, has no effect currently; 'top' | 'bottom' | 'middle'
ast.target: 供未来使用，目前无效果；'top' | 'bottom' | 'middle'

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Set ea.style.roundness. 0: is the legacy value, 3: is the current default value, null is sharp
ast.target: 设置 ea.style.roundness。0: 是传统值，3: 是当前默认值，null 表示尖锐。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Use ExcalidrawAutomate.getExportSettings(boolean,boolean) to create an ExportSettings object.
Use ExcalidrawAutomate.getEmbeddedFilesLoader(boolean?) to create an EmbeddedFilesLoader object.
ast.target: 使用 ExcalidrawAutomate.getExportSettings(boolean,boolean) 创建 ExportSettings 对象。\n使用 ExcalidrawAutomate.getEmbeddedFilesLoader(boolean?) 创建 EmbeddedFilesLoader 对象。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The same as createPNG but returns a base64 encoded string instead of a file.
ast.target: 与 createPNG 相同，但返回 base64 编码的字符串而不是文件。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: returns the base64 dataURL of the LaTeX equation rendered as an SVG. tex is the LaTeX equation string
ast.target: 返回 LaTeX 方程渲染为 SVG 的 base64 数据 URL。tex 是 LaTeX 方程字符串。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Adds a text label to a line or arrow. Currently only works with a simple straight 2-point (start & end) line
ast.target: 为线条或箭头添加文本标签。目前仅适用于简单的两点（起点和终点）直线。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: clear() + reset all style values to default
ast.target: clear() + 将所有样式值重置为默认值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns true if MD file is an Excalidraw file
ast.target: 如果 MD 文件是 Excalidraw 文件，则返回 true。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 当前正在编辑的 Obsidian 视图。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Markdown renderer will drop a copy of the most recent SVG here for debugging purposes
ast.target: Markdown 渲染器将在此处放置最新 SVG 的副本以供调试。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Utility function to generate EmbeddedFilesLoader object
ast.target: 用于生成 EmbeddedFilesLoader 对象的实用函数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Open a file in a new workspaceleaf or reuse an existing adjacent leaf depending on Excalidraw Plugin Settings
ast.target: 在新的工作区叶子中打开文件，或根据 Excalidraw 插件设置重用现有的相邻叶子。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Measures text size based on current style settings
ast.target: 根据当前样式设置测量文本大小。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Returns true if plugin version is >= than required
recommended use:
<code>if(!ea.verifyMinimumPluginVersion || !ea.verifyMinimumPluginVersion("1.5.20")) {new Notice("message");return;}<code>
ast.target: 如果插件版本 >= 所需版本，则返回 true。\n推荐用法：\n<code>if(!ea.verifyMinimumPluginVersion || !ea.verifyMinimumPluginVersion(\"1.5.20\")) {new Notice(\"message\");return;}<code>

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns an 8 character long random id
ast.target: 返回一个 8 个字符长的随机 ID。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts a HEX color to an RGB number array. #FF0000 to [255,0,0]
ast.target: 将十六进制颜色转换为 RGB 数字数组。#FF0000 转换为 [255,0,0]。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts an RGB number array to a HEX string. [255,0,0] to #FF0000
ast.target: 将 RGB 数字数组转换为十六进制字符串。[255,0,0] 转换为 #FF0000。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts an HSL number array to an RGB number array. [0,100,50] to [255,0,0]
ast.target: 将 HSL 数字数组转换为 RGB 数字数组。[0,100,50] 转换为 [255,0,0]。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts an RGB number array to an HSL number array. [255,0,0] to [0,100,50]
ast.target: 将 RGB 数字数组转换为 HSL 数字数组。[255,0,0] 转换为 [0,100,50]。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts a CSS color name to its HEX color equivalent. 'White' to #FFFFFF
ast.target: 将 CSS 颜色名称转换为其十六进制颜色等效值。'White' 转换为 #FFFFFF。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns a new instance of ExcalidrawAutomate.
ast.target: 返回 ExcalidrawAutomate 的新实例。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: @returns the last recorded pointer position on the Excalidraw canvas
ast.target: @returns Excalidraw 画布上最后记录的指针位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: @returns the center position of the current view in Excalidraw coordinates
ast.target: @returns Excalidraw 坐标中当前视图的中心位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns the WorkspaceLeaf hosting the Excalidraw sidepanel view, or null if the sidepanel is not present.
ast.target: 返回托管 Excalidraw 侧边栏视图的 WorkspaceLeaf，如果侧边栏不存在则返回 null。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Toggles the Excalidraw sidepanel visibility when the sidepanel is hosted in the left or right workspace split. If the sidepanel is not attached to a left/right sidebar, no action is taken.
ast.target: 当侧边栏托管在左侧或右侧工作区分区中时，切换 Excalidraw 侧边栏的可见性。如果侧边栏未附加到左侧/右侧边栏，则不执行任何操作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Pins the active script's sidepanel tab so it persists across Obsidian restarts and returns it.
ast.target: 固定活动脚本的侧边栏标签页，使其在 Obsidian 重启后保持不变，并返回它。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Parses raw text through targetView.excalidrawData using the same parsing pipeline as ExcalidrawData (including transclusion resolution, link brackets, and link/url prefixes from frontmatter). Works only when ea.targetView is set and loaded.
ast.target: 通过 targetView.excalidrawData 解析原始文本，使用与 ExcalidrawData 相同的解析管道（包括转置解析、链接括号以及 frontmatter 中的链接/URL 前缀）。仅在 ea.targetView 已设置并加载时有效。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Checks if the folder exists, if not, creates it.
ast.target: 检查文件夹是否存在，如果不存在，则创建它。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Checks if the filepath already exists, if so, returns a new filepath with a number appended to the filename else returns the filepath as provided.
ast.target: 检查文件路径是否已存在，如果存在，则返回一个在文件名后附加了数字的新文件路径，否则返回提供的文件路径。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
High-level wrapper for multimodal image-analysis requests.
Supply an image in request.image or in message parts and optionally add text, instruction, or messages.
The configured text model must have multimodal support enabled.
ast.target:
用于多模态图像分析请求的高级包装器。
在 request.image 或消息部分中提供图像，并可选择添加 text、instruction 或 messages。
配置的文本模型必须启用多模态支持。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Applies a prompt-based transform to an input image using the configured image model.
Requires request.image. This is intended for providers/models that support image plus prompt edits without a mask.
ast.target:
使用配置的图像模型对输入图像应用基于提示的转换。
需要 request.image。这适用于支持图像加提示编辑（无需遮罩）的提供商/模型。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Applies a mask-based edit to an input image using the configured image model.
Requires both request.image and request.imageGenerationProperties.mask.
ast.target:
使用配置的图像模型对输入图像应用基于遮罩的编辑。
需要 request.image 和 request.imageGenerationProperties.mask。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Opens a modal dialog showing per-model AI token usage for the current session.
The dialog includes a 'Copy as Markdown' button so the table can be pasted elsewhere.
ast.target:
打开一个模态对话框，显示当前会话的每个模型的 AI 令牌使用情况。
该对话框包含一个“复制为 Markdown”按钮，以便将表格粘贴到其他地方。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Returns a compact label string summarising total session token usage.
Format: "AI Usage: 355k/23k" (input tokens / output tokens).
Appends image generation count when present, e.g. "AI Usage: 355k/23k + 3 imgs".
ast.target:
返回一个紧凑的标签字符串，总结总会话令牌使用情况。
格式：\"AI Usage: 355k/23k\"（输入令牌 / 输出令牌）。
当存在图像生成计数时会附加，例如 \"AI Usage: 355k/23k + 3 imgs\"。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Grabs the codeblock content from the supplied markdown string. Returns an array of dictionaries with the codeblock content and type
ast.target: 从提供的 markdown 字符串中获取代码块内容。返回一个包含代码块内容和类型的字典数组。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts a string to a DataURL.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Sets Excalidraw in the targetView to view-mode
ast.target: 在 targetView 中将 Excalidraw 设置为查看模式。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Splits a file path into its components.
ast.target: 将文件路径拆分为其组成部分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Compresses String to a Base64 string using LZString
ast.target: 使用 LZString 将字符串压缩为 Base64 字符串。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Decompresses a base 64 compressed string using LZString
ast.target: 使用 LZString 解压缩 base64 压缩的字符串。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The TFile of the currently running script
ast.target: 当前正在运行的脚本的 TFile。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Denotes an excalidraw file. If key is not present, the file will not be recognized as an Excalidraw file. Valid values are 'parsed' and 'raw'
ast.target: 表示一个 excalidraw 文件。如果键不存在，该文件将不会被识别为 Excalidraw 文件。有效值为 'parsed' 和 'raw'。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Specifies how Excalidraw should open by default. Valid values are: view|zen
ast.target: 指定 Excalidraw 默认应如何打开。有效值为：view|zen。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The value of this field will be executed as javascript code using the Script Engine environment. Use this to initiate custom actions or logic when loading your drawing.
ast.target: 此字段的值将使用脚本引擎环境作为 JavaScript 代码执行。使用此功能可在加载绘图时启动自定义操作或逻辑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default value (if not set) is true, if set to false internal links will not be exported to SVG images and PDFs.
ast.target: 默认值（如果未设置）为 true，如果设置为 false，内部链接将不会导出到 SVG 图像和 PDF 中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this key is present the file will be opened as a markdown file in the editor
ast.target: 如果存在此键，文件将在编辑器中作为 markdown 文件打开。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Override autoexport settings for this file. Valid values are
none
both
png
svg
ast.target:
覆盖此文件的自动导出设置。有效值为
none
both
png
svg。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this key is present the drawing will be handled as a mask to crop an image.
ast.target: 如果存在此键，绘图将被处理为裁剪图像的遮罩。

ast.name: error
ast.source: new drawing not recognized as an excalidraw file
ast.target: 新绘图未被识别为 excalidraw 文件。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected block-seq-ind on same line with key
ast.target: 同一行上与键一起出现意外的 block-seq-ind。

ast.name: message
ast.source: targetView not set, or no longer active. Use setView before calling this function
ast.target: targetView 未设置或不再活动。在调用此函数之前请使用 setView。

ast.name: message
ast.source: this function is not available on Obsidian Mobile
ast.target: 此函数在 Obsidian 移动端上不可用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tapering options for the start of the line.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tapering options for the end of the line.

ast.name: text
ast.target: 关于 Obsidian Publish 支持的视频
